title: Juncales
content: Juncales is an order of flowering plant s. In the Engler system (update, of 1964) and in the Cronquist system (of 1981, which placed this order in subclass Commelinidae) it is circumscribed as: However, the Thorne system (1992) accepts it as consisting of: The APG II system, used here, assigns the plants involved to the order Poales.
